notes: Catalog of reusable pipeline step patterns (Lego bricks) for mChatAI+ AI Automation. AIWizard and pipeline-builder prompts should compose from these components before generating custom steps. CONTEXT.md has the full assembly guide.

components.name: Web Fetch + Summarize
components.summary: Fetch a URL and summarize its content with an LLM.

components.name: LLM → Speech → Notify
components.summary: Convert LLM text output to speech, save audio artifact, and notify the user.

components.name: LLM → Document Save
components.summary: Generate text with an LLM and save as a markdown artifact.

components.name: Feed → Podcast
components.summary: Full podcast chain: fetch RSS feed, write script, convert to audio, notify.

components.name: Gmail Digest
components.summary: Fetch unread emails, summarize with LLM, save digest, notify.

components.name: Gmail Draft → Approve → Send
components.summary: Fetch emails, draft replies with LLM, pause for human approval, then send.

components.name: Telegram Knowledge Base Bot
components.summary: Poll Telegram for messages, search knowledge base, reply with LLM.

components.name: MCP Fetch + Summarize
components.summary: Call an MCP server tool (e.g. fetch), summarize the result, save and notify.

components.name: Todos → Report
components.summary: Fetch all todos, analyze or summarize with LLM, save as a report.

components.name: Shell → Summarize → Notify
components.summary: Run a shell command and have the LLM summarize the output.

components.name: File → LLM Review → Save
components.summary: Read a file, run an LLM review (bugs, security, clarity), save the report.

components.name: Web Search → Extract → Synthesize
components.summary: Search the web for a topic, extract page content, synthesize a research brief.

components.name: Primary Source Finder
components.summary: Find authority-of-record sources for legal, finance, medical, academic, product, and technical claims before synthesis.

components.name: Source Credibility Ranker
components.summary: Rank candidate sources by authority, recency, independence, proximity, and transparency.

components.name: Date-Sensitive Source Checker
components.summary: Verify facts likely to change and require source, effective, filing, access, trial, price, or release dates.

components.name: Duplicate Source Collapse
components.summary: Collapse repeated or derivative coverage to the strongest original source for each claim family.

components.name: Source Quote Extractor
components.summary: Extract short evidence snippets or precise paraphrases that directly support material claims.

components.name: Claim Ledger
components.summary: Create claim, citation URL, support strength, date, and caveat rows before final synthesis.

components.name: Citation-to-Claim Verifier
components.summary: Check that each cited source directly supports the sentence or claim it follows.

components.name: Rubric Expectation Checklist
components.summary: Predict what an expert rubric is likely to require and check the draft against those expectations.

components.name: Objectivity and Limitations Pass
components.summary: Add conflicts, uncertainty, missing evidence, alternatives, and limitations before final answer delivery.
